response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio for the song 'Bitter Choco Decoration' matches the Japanese lyrics found via external research. The English translation from the reference JSON was utilized. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON provided English lyrics and scene descriptions; I manually transcribed the original Japanese vocals and the English dialogue to ensure complete bilingual coverage. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal bursts. Instantaneous transitions and aggressive truncation were applied during rapid-fire song segments to maintain synchronization. Visual text (song title and credits) was included per the Visual Events rule.

subtitles.original:
ビターチョコデコレーション
Lyrics, Music: syudou
人を過度に信じないように
subtitles.english: So as not to trust people too much

subtitles.original: 愛さないように 期待しないように
subtitles.english: Not to love, not to expect

subtitles.original: かと言って角が立たないように
気取らぬように 目立たぬように
subtitles.english: Not to be pretentious, not to stand out

subtitles.original: 誰一人傷つけぬように
subtitles.english: So as not to hurt anyone

subtitles.original: 虐めぬように 殺さぬように
subtitles.english: Not to bully, not to kill

subtitles.original: かと言って偽善がバレないように
subtitles.english: But not to be exposed as a hypocrite

subtitles.original: 威張らないように
軽いジョークやリップサービスも
subtitles.english: Not to forget light jokes and lip service

subtitles.original: 忘れぬようにどんな時も
subtitles.english: To remember them at all times

subtitles.original: 笑って愛嬌振りまくように

subtitles.original: ...先日何処かで？・・・やっぱいいや」
subtitles.english: ...Did you happen to be somewhere the other day? Nah, forget it”

subtitles.original: 無駄に自我を晒さぬように

subtitles.original: 笑わすより笑われるように

またへーこらへーこら言っちゃって
